defects.claim: Scaled Ampush to ~$30M revenue (managed $50–100M/yr in ad spend), bootstrapped — no VC
defects.why: The corpus states Ampush managed '$1B+ in media spend' total and reached '$2 million in monthly revenue' by August 2011, but contains no figure of ~$30M revenue or $50–100M/yr in ad spend as specific metrics; the $1B+ managed spend figure materially supersedes the claimed $50–100M/yr range, and no $30M revenue figure appears.
